text: Inhalation of α-diketones by laboratory animals result in severe damage of the airway epithelium (Hubbs et al. 2012, Morgan et al. 2012, 2016). Also exposure of in vitro models of airway epithelium to α-diketones leads to a complete destruction of the epithelial layer (Zaccone et al. 2015, Foster et al. 2017).
